title: DotGlobeHero Component
content:
## DotGlobeHero Component This component renders a visually appealing, animated globe using `react-three-fiber` and `react-three-drei`. It's designed to serve as a hero section or background element, with a content area overlaid on top of the rotating globe. ### Key Exports * `DotGlobeHero`: The main React component for rendering the globe hero. * `DotGlobeHeroProps`: The interface defining the props for the `DotGlobeHero` component. ### Props * `rotationSpeed`: (Optional) Controls the speed of the globe's rotation. Defaults to `0.005`. * `globeRadius`: (Optional) Sets the radius of the globe. Defaults to `1`. * `className`: (Optional) Allows for custom styling of the main container div. * `children`: (Optional) Content to be displayed in the foreground, centered above the globe. ### Internal Components * `Globe`: A private component responsible for rendering the 3D globe geometry and materials. ### Usage Example ```jsx import { DotGlobeHero } from "@/components/ui/globe-hero"; function MyPage() { return (

Welcome to DocMed

Explore our documentation with a spinning globe!

 ); } export default MyPage; ```
